title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
